devdoc.details: A secure vault for managing deposits and withdrawals on the Mezo Network.

balanceOf(address).details: Returns the balance of a specific user.

deposit().details: Allows users to deposit Mezo BTC/ETH into the vault.

sweep().details: Emergency function for the owner to recover funds sent to the contract by mistake.

totalAssets().details: Returns the total balance held by the contract.

withdraw(uint256).details: Allows users to withdraw their deposited funds. Uses the secure .call method and Checks-Effects-Interactions pattern.
